title: Staff Software Engineer - AI
company_focus:
AI-driven supply chain transformation and real-time
visibility platform for global logistics
description:
At FourKites we have the opportunity to tackle complex
challenges with real-world impacts. Whether it’s medical
supplies from Cardinal Health or groceries for Walmart, the
FourKites platform helps customers operate global supply
chains that are efficient, agile and sustainable.

Join a team of curious problem solvers that celebrates
differences, leads with empathy and values inclusivity

As a Staff Software Engineer, you will have the opportunity
to work on challenging and impactful problems in the
logistics and supply chain industry. You will be responsible
for designing, developing, and delivering features that help
our customers track and manage their shipments in real time.

You will develop cutting-edge products that can change the
logistics landscape globally and will be used by many of the
biggest corporations in the world. You will work closely
with a team of talented engineers and product managers to
build and improve our platform. You will also have the
opportunity to mentor and coach junior engineers, and to
contribute to the overall architecture and design of our
system.

What you'll be doing:

- Develop, test and maintain backend applications
- Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code
- Design and implement data models and database schemas
- Collaborate with the frontend team to integrate the backend
  with the user interface
- Perform code reviews and ensure code quality standards are
  met
- Troubleshoot and debug applications
- Implement code with very high coverage of unit tests and
  component tests
- Cross-training peers and mentoring teammates
- Work with the DevOps team to deploy and manage applications
  in production
- Continuously learn and stay up-to-date with new technologies
  and industry trends

Who you are:

- Design, architect, implement, test, profile, release, and
  optimize highest quality software/services
- Strong understanding of Object-oriented programming
  principles
- Good knowledge of Java + Spring, GoLang, Ruby on Rails
- Experience in Cloud: Azure and Amazon Web Services
- Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, or MongoDB
- Familiarity with front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS,
  and JavaScript
- Good knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices
  architecture
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- Ability to work independently and in a team environment

- Possess expert knowledge in performance, security,
  scalability, architecture, and best practices
- Strong knowledge of Git (branches, submodules, rebasing) and
  other Agile tools such as JIRA & Confluence.
- Agile SDLC experience.

- Excellent oral and written communication skills

Impact & Growth

You'll directly contribute to AI initiatives generating
millions in revenue while shaping systems processing
millions of transactions daily. Lead technical decisions
affecting 25+ engineers while mentoring the next generation
of AI engineers. Be at the forefront of production AI
optimization, balancing performance, cost, and latency for
enterprise customers.

We know that job postings can be intimidating, and research
shows that while men apply to jobs when they meet an average
of 60% of the criteria, women and other marginalized folks
tend to only apply when they check every box. We encourage
you to apply if you think you may be a fit and give us both
a chance to find out!

Who we are:

FourKites®, the leader in AI-driven supply chain
transformation for global enterprises and pioneer of
advanced real-time visibility, turns supply chain data into
automated action. FourKites’ Intelligent Control Tower™
breaks down enterprise silos by creating a real-time digital
twin of orders, shipments, inventory and assets. This
comprehensive view, combined with AI-powered digital
workers, enables companies to prevent disruptions, automate
routine tasks, and optimize performance across their supply
chain. FourKites processes over 3.2 million supply chain
events daily — from purchase orders to final delivery —
helping 1,600+ global brands prevent disruptions, make
faster decisions and move from reactive tracking to
proactive supply chain orchestration.

FourKites provides competitive compensation with stock
options, outstanding benefits and a collaborative culture
for all employees around the globe. To help you be your
best, we have 5 global recharge days, in addition to
generous PTO and standard holidays. Parental leave for all
parents, an annual wellness stipend and volunteer days also
provide you with time and resources for self care and to
care for others. Throughout the year, FourKites sets aside
time during the workday to learn and celebrate diversity.
We're always listening for new ways to support everyone in
and out of the office.

For India

- Medical  benefits start on first day of employment
- 36 PTO days( Sick, Casual and Earned) , 5 recharge days, 2
  volunteer days
- Home Office set ups and Technology reimbursement
- Lifestyle & Family benefits
- Mental Wellness support and guidance
- Ongoing learning & development opportunities ( Professional
  development program, Toast Master club etc.)

FourKites is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate
diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive
environment for all employees.
responsibilities: Develop, test and maintain backend applications
Design and implement data models and database schemas
Collaborate with frontend team to integrate backend with user interface
Perform code reviews and ensure code quality standards are met
Implement code with high coverage of unit tests and component tests
Work with DevOps team to deploy and manage applications in production
use_cases: Global supply chain visibility and orchestration
Automated supply chain actions and routine task automation
Digital twin creation for orders, shipments, inventory and assets
ai_classification_reasoning:
While the job title includes "AI" and mentions AI
initiatives, the actual responsibilities are focused on
backend software engineering - developing applications,
writing code, designing databases, and working with DevOps.
There's no mention of building, training, fine-tuning, or
deploying AI/ML models. The role supports AI-powered
products but doesn't work directly on the AI systems
themselves.
